'''Ral Yekkiv''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] and an associate of [[Roger Stern]]. He met with a group of rebels on [[Greyman's Planet]] when they came to meet with Stern. Unfortunately Stern had been captured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], though he told the group to continue with their mission to get supplies and transport them to [[Karinda Outpost]], as he was taking care of freeing Stern himself.
